name: PSFBeadsInputParameters
from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
is_a: MetricsInputParameters
attributes:
  bit_depth:
    name: bit_depth
    description: Detector bit depth
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    owner: PSFBeadsInputParameters
    domain_of:
    - FieldIlluminationInputParameters
    - PSFBeadsInputParameters
    - UserExperimentInputParameters
    range: integer
    multivalued: false
    minimum_value: 1
    maximum_value: 64
  saturation_threshold:
    name: saturation_threshold
    description: Tolerated saturation threshold. If the amount of saturated pixels
      is above this threshold, the image is considered as saturated and the analysis
      is not performed.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    ifabsent: float(0.01)
    owner: PSFBeadsInputParameters
    domain_of:
    - FieldIlluminationInputParameters
    - PSFBeadsInputParameters
    - UserExperimentInputParameters
    range: float
    multivalued: false
    minimum_value: 0.0
    maximum_value: 1.0
  min_lateral_distance_factor:
    name: min_lateral_distance_factor
    description: Minimal distance that has to separate laterally the beads represented
      as the  number of times the expected FWHM of the beads.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    ifabsent: float(20)
    owner: PSFBeadsInputParameters
    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsInputParameters
    range: float
    required: true
    minimum_value: 10.0
    maximum_value: 30.0
  sigma_min:
    name: sigma_min
    description: Min value for the range of sigmas used in for the detection of the
      beads. Lower values will tend to include  noisy pixels as beads.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    ifabsent: float(1.0)
    owner: PSFBeadsInputParameters
    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsInputParameters
    range: float
    required: true
  sigma_max:
    name: sigma_max
    description: Max value for the range of sigmas used in for the detection of the
      beads. Higher values will tend to detect  larger objects as beads.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    ifabsent: float(5.0)
    owner: PSFBeadsInputParameters
    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsInputParameters
    range: float
    required: true
  snr_threshold:
    name: snr_threshold
    description: Signal to noise ratio threshold to be used for bead detection.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    ifabsent: float(10.0)

    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsInputParameters
    range: float
    required: true

    name: fitting_gaussian_r2_threshold
    description: Threshold for the coefficient of determination (R^2) of the gaussian
      fit to be considered good.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    ifabsent: float(0.95)
    owner: PSFBeadsInputParameters
    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsInputParameters
    range: float
    required: true
  fitting_airy_r2_threshold:

      fit to be considered good.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    ifabsent: float(0.5)
    owner: PSFBeadsInputParameters
    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsInputParameters
    range: float
    required: true

from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema

attributes:

    rank: 1000
    owner: PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - FieldIlluminationKeyMeasurement

    - UserExperimentKeyMeasurement
    range: integer
    multivalued: false
    minimum_value: 0
  total_bead_count:
    name: total_bead_count
    description: Total number of beads detected in the image. One value per channel.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    owner: PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    range: integer
    multivalued: false
  considered_valid_count:
    name: considered_valid_count
    description: Number of beads analyzed. One value per channel.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    owner: PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    range: integer
    multivalued: false
  considered_self_proximity_count:
    name: considered_self_proximity_count
    description: Number of beads considered for being too close to another bead. One
      value per channel.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    owner: PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    range: integer
    multivalued: false
  considered_lateral_edge_count:
    name: considered_lateral_edge_count
    description: Number of beads considered for being too close to the edge of the
      image. One value per channel.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    owner: PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    range: integer
    multivalued: false
  considered_axial_edge_count:
    name: considered_axial_edge_count
    description: Number of beads considered as being too close to the top and or bottom
      of the image. These beads are not considered for the z axis FWHM measurements.
      One value per channel.
    from_schema: https://MontpellierRessourcesImagerie.github.io/microscopemetrics-schema
    rank: 1000
    owner: PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    domain_of:
    - PSFBeadsKeyMeasurement
    range: integer
    multivalued: false
  considered_intensity_outlier_count:
    name: considered_intensity_outlier_count
    description: Number of beads considered as being too intense and potentially represent

docs.text: The alpha value of the color (optional)

docs.title: Slot: analyzed_bead_centers
docs.text: The centers of the beads that have been analyzed. One point shape will be provided per bead correctly detected. One ROI per channel.

docs.title: Slot: array_data
docs.text: A non-required slot for non-serializable array data object

docs.title: Slot: author
docs.text: The author of the comment

docs.title: Slot: authors
docs.text: The authors of the protocol

docs.title: Slot: average_bead
docs.text: The average bead image created from all the beads considered valid. The average bead is calculated after aligning the beads in all three axes. This one image contains all the channels. If the analysis does not detect at least two beads in a channel, the average bead for this channel is not calculated.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fit_airy_r2_x
docs.text: Coefficient of determination (R^2) for the airy fit in the X axis of the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fit_airy_r2_y
docs.text: Coefficient of determination (R^2) for the airy fit in the Y axis of the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fit_airy_r2_z
docs.text: Coefficient of determination (R^2) for the airy fit in the Z axis of the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fit_gaussian_r2_x
docs.text: Coefficient of determination (R^2) for the gaussian fit in the X axis of the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fit_gaussian_r2_y
docs.text: Coefficient of determination (R^2) for the gaussian fit in the Y axis of the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fit_gaussian_r2_z
docs.text: Coefficient of determination (R^2) for the gaussian fit in the Z axis of the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fwhm_lateral_asymmetry_ratio
docs.text: Lateral FWHM asymmetry ratio for the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fwhm_micron_x
docs.text: FWHM for the average bead in the X axis in microns. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fwhm_micron_y
docs.text: FWHM for the average bead in the Y axis in microns. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fwhm_micron_z
docs.text: Average FWHM for the beads in the Z axis in microns. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fwhm_pixel_x
docs.text: FWHM for the average bead in the X axis in pixels. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fwhm_pixel_y
docs.text: FWHM for the average bead in the Y axis in pixels. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_fwhm_pixel_z
docs.text: FWHM for the average bead in the Z axis in pixels. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_intensity_integrated
docs.text: Integrated intensity for the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_intensity_max
docs.text: Maximum intensity for the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_intensity_min
docs.text: Minimum intensity for the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: average_bead_intensity_std
docs.text: Standard deviation of the intensity for the average bead. One value per channel.

docs.title: Slot: axis
docs.text: The axis of the orthogonal image

docs.title: Slot: b
docs.text: The blue value of the color

docs.title: Slot: bead_diameter_micron
docs.text: The diameter of the beads in the sample measured in microns.

docs.title: Slot: bead_profiles_x
docs.text: The intensity profiles along the x axis of the analyzed beads as well as the fits.

docs.title: Slot: bead_profiles_y
docs.text: The intensity profiles along the y axis of the analyzed beads as well as the fits.

docs.title: Slot: bead_profiles_z
docs.text: The intensity profiles along the z axis of the analyzed beads as well as the fits.

docs.title: Slot: bead_properties
docs.text: Properties associated with the analysis of the beads.

docs.title: Slot: bit_depth
docs.text: Detector bit depth

docs.title: Slot: bottom_center_intensity_mean
docs.text: The mean intensity of the bottom-center of the image

docs.title: Slot: bottom_center_intensity_ratio
docs.text: The mean intensity of the bottom-center of the image divided by the maximum intensity of the center of illumination

docs.title: Slot: bottom_left_intensity_mean
docs.text: The mean intensity of the bottom-left of the image

docs.title: Slot: bottom_left_intensity_ratio
docs.text: The mean intensity of the bottom-left of the image divided by the maximum intensity of the center of illumination

docs.title: Slot: bottom_right_intensity_mean
